message:
fix(fp-frame): use explicit Scalar constructors in isin_dict and applymap tests

Replace bare `_i64.into()` and `"str".into()` calls with explicit
`Scalar::Int64()` and `Scalar::Utf8()` constructors in tests added by
c782fc7. The From<i64>/From<&str> traits are not implemented for Scalar
(only for IndexLabel), so these tests failed to compile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
